title: GSK Advances Ovarian Cancer Drug Mo-Rez Through Clinical Pipeline
detail: GSK is advancing mo-rez, its ovarian cancer drug candidate, through clinical development with positive momentum. The drug is progressing through trials with encouraging signals for patients with ovarian cancer, per STAT News biotech coverage.

media.caption: GSK advances ovarian cancer drug mo-rez in clinical development

title: FDA Rejects Replimune Drug Again; Revolution Medicines Pancreatic Cancer Pill Advances
detail: The FDA issued its second rejection of Replimune's cancer drug application, dealing a significant blow to the biotech. In the same regulatory cycle, Revolution Medicines' pancreatic cancer pill continued to advance in the oncology pipeline, offering a potential new treatment option for one of oncology's hardest-to-treat cancers.

media.caption: FDA rejects Replimune cancer drug for second time; Revolution Medicines pancreatic pill advances
